name: Kajsa Hoffmann
text: Had a great time! Very generous servings and vibrant and funny lady working there:) recommend 100%. The view from the terrace is also stunning and the whole atmosphere. I’ll come back!
responseFromOwnerText: So glad you enjoyed our winery. Hope to see you again. 🙏
title: Cape Naturaliste Vineyard

name: Sean Brady
text: Hands down one of the best wine tasting experiences I've ever had. The cellar door manager Deb was incredibly knowledgeable and friendly. Combine that with the wines being organic and absolutely delicious and I can't fault anything. They're also extreme dog lovers which adds to the wholesomeness of the experience.
responseFromOwnerText: Thankyou for your fab review. So glad you enjoyed it & hope to see you again🙏
title: Cape Naturaliste Vineyard

name: Janet DVG
text:
Wow! This winery is a 'hidden gem'!!
Sensational views with stunning gardens. The wines are first class and our beautiful cellar door host Tracey was fun, entertaining as well as knowledgeable about the wines and region. Not only did we leave with a few cases of spectacular wine but also with great memories of a fun outing. We'll be back!!!!
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Nat Dwyer
text: Capel Vale never disappoints!! Amazing service, incredible food, wine and an absolutely stunning location. This is a must do for anyone visiting the area!!
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Monique O'Sullivan
text: This was my third time at this beautiful winery. I can never fault it. The gardens are so beautiful and the wine is some of the best wines I have ever tasted. The service was so wonderful and friendly and the host Nicole was funny, knowledgeable, and bent over backwards to make sure we enjoyed ourselves. Will be back again. And again
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Jazz Wilson
text:
Absolutely love this place!!
I recently had my baby shower here and the staff were incredible and helped in every way they could! I couldn't recommend this place more, to the point I'm trying to convince my partner to have our wedding here haha! On top of that the views are beautiful
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Anita Biggin
text:
Wonderful service and amazing wines - cannot fault.
What a glorious setting - so picturesque - host Nicole was bubbly, friendly and very welcoming / even helped us put our wine in the car - highly recommend a visit.
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Stephanie Q
text: This place is a real find! It is a perfect place to stop on the way back to Perth or on the way down south. It is easy to get to from the highway - even towing our van. The gardens are stunning...and that is just the carpark! We had a wonderful experience testing wines we wouldn't normally drink. The hostess really knew her stuff and helped us select a range of amazing wines. It pays to try new things. We'd definitely go back next time we head down south. We're now red wine converts! 🍷 💕
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Todd Baker
text:
My associates and I visited this Winery last weekend for a Business meeting and were pleasantly surprised by the place! I was prompty served by the waitress who was bubbly and professional. The wine was delicious and the views, OMG! Thankyou so much Nicole for an amazing experience!

Our only mishap was a large group nearby who were loud, disrespectful to not only the staff, but also constantly bothered us with their behavior, and let their kids run amok without supervision. They also decided to leave a series of One star reviews on Google, all of which are utterly false and misleading.
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Peter Hernaman
text: Friendly and helpful staff with lovely facilities and great wine to taste.
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: joanna north
text: Absolutely beautiful winery. My husband and I stopped to try the wines. Great service,  knowledgeable staff and plenty wines to try. My favourite is the Debut Rose.  Had  yummy cheese and crackers.  Definitely worth stopping.
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Lisa Harman
text: What a beautiful winery to visit. The gardens are striking, and better still, each wine we tasted was world class. I am a new fan of their reds. The cellar door lady, Nicole was so easy going and knowledgeable on each of the wines. A big smile and very warm. We will certainly be buying many more bottles from this south west gem.
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Laura Richards
text: What a beautiful place to have lunch!  The views are stunning and the service from all staff was exceptional.  Very informative wine tastings and the food was divine.  Will be recommending this place to all of my friends!
title: Capel Vale Wines & Cellar Door

name: Suzanne Miguel
text: Wonderful experience. The wines were delicious and served by knowledgeable, enthusiastic staff who genuinely wanted the best experience for us. Highly recommend this beautiful winery and look forward to coming back.

name: Waverly Bellis
text: Well well well ... On our recent visit to Capel Vale it was fabulously refreshing to find a Winery that has a great range of wines and the server/host has both an extensive knowledge of the wine she was serving us and personality 😀.  We tried both reds🍷 and whites🥂 which were very much delicious, and much to our palate as are the bubbles 🫧 🍾.   We did phone ahead to see what was on the menu, to be informed that the restaurant as this time was closed, but we where more than welcome to BYO our own little platter so we could sit and enjoy with a glass or 2 whilst we enjoyed the beautiful views of the gardens and vineyard.  We will be back on our next trip southbound, but in the mean time we can do a phone order and have our wines of choice delivered 😀 Thank you to Nicole for making our visit very enjoyable and entertaining.  See you next time.

name: mia biddle
text: My friend and I went wine tasting at Cherubino on Good Friday, and I can honestly say it was an amazing experience. The staff were incredibly knowledgeable and professional, and Isabelle in particular made it extra special she was so lovely and truly made our experience feel five-star.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Julie Oliver
text:
Just had a fabulous wine tasting experience with Evie at Cherubino.
Very informative tasting and Evie was very intuitive regarding our tastes and our tasting.
Now we are sat on the balcony, overlooking the vineyards, with a cheese platter and a bottle of red and a bottle of white. Life does not get much better ❤️
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Julie,
Thank you so much for the lovely review — we’re delighted to hear you had such a special time with us.

Evie will be so pleased to hear your kind words, and it’s wonderful to know you were able to relax and enjoy the view with a glass of wine in hand.

We hope to welcome you back again soon.
Cheers 🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Matthew W
text:
We’ve been wanting to visit Cherubino for years, especially being locals to the Subi wine bar, so we were really looking forward to it. The wine itself was great and lived up to expectations.

Unfortunately the service was really disappointing. The staff seemed completely rushed off their feet and we genuinely felt sorry for them. We waited around 40 minutes before being served, which meant we missed visiting another winery we had planned. After finally getting served, we were told they were too busy to do a cheese board.

It honestly felt like a management issue rather than a staff issue. On a long weekend, you would expect the cellar door to be properly staffed. A shame, because the wine was excellent, but the overall experience didn’t match it.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Matthew,
Thank you for your feedback, and for taking the time to visit us. We’re sorry to hear your experience didn’t meet expectations, particularly given you’d been looking forward to it.

The delays and overall service you’ve described are certainly not the standard we aim to deliver, and we understand how disappointing that would have been — especially when you had plans following your visit.

We’d really value the opportunity to speak with you directly and make it up to you. Please feel free to contact us at customer-care@cherubinowines.com, so we can follow this up properly.

Warm regards.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Nicole Pellizzari
text:
hired all 3 Guest Houses for my sons wedding,
All the houses are stunning couldn’t fault anything!!
Hosted a Rehearsal Dinner in Guest House 2 with Private chef, house was perfect for the event.
Isabelle was amazing with her correspondence and easy to reach if we needed her.
Highly Highly recommend hiring the Cherubino Guest Houses
Very Very Happy
Nicole P.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Nicole,
Thank you so much for your beautiful review — we’re truly delighted to hear your son’s wedding was such a special experience with us.

It’s wonderful to know the guest houses and setting made the perfect backdrop, and we’ll be sure to pass your kind words on to Isabella as well.

Thank you again for trusting us with such an important occasion — we hope to welcome you back again in the future.
Warm regards ✨
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: James McCallister
text: Absolutely love this wine and am a member of the wine club. However, I got the most horrendous service when I was last down for a holiday. 35 minutes between pouring one tasting to the next wine tastings. It was an absolute joke.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi James,
Thank you for your feedback, and for being a member of our wine club — we truly appreciate your ongoing support. We’re very sorry to hear about your experience during your recent visit, as the delays you describe are certainly not acceptable and not the standard we aim to deliver.

Waiting that long between tastings would be frustrating for anyone, and we understand how disappointing that must have been, particularly given your familiarity with our wines and cellar door.

We’d really value the opportunity to speak with you directly and make it up to you. Please feel free to reach out to us at customer-care@cherubinowines.com
, so we can follow this up properly.

Warm regards, 
The Cherubino Team
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

Stellar wine tasting!
One of the best cellar doors I’ve been to in Margaret River. The location is gorgeous, and the wines equally so. The staff were welcoming from the start, making us feel at home. The premium wine tasting hosted some of the best wines I’ve tasted from a cellar door tasting. If you’re looking for a cellar door to hit on your trip around Margaret river, this is 100% the one
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Andrew,
Thank you so much for the wonderful review — we’re delighted to hear you enjoyed your tasting with us. It’s great to know the wines, the setting and the team made you feel at home from the moment you arrived.

We really appreciate the recommendation and hope to welcome you back to the cellar door again soon. Cheers 🍷

name: Rhonda M
text:
Beautiful property and amazing service. Quality wines at affordable prices. Oe of few wineries we found open on Good Friday. What a gorgeous place. The vineyards and patio were so peaceful and well maintained.

I opted for the white wines on the tasting menu and the staff were very accommodating . There are reds included in the tasting but they were happy to swap a couple of bubbles for me. They also have sweet wines for tasting. Dee was the manager at the cellar door who waited on me and was such a pleasant, friendly person. I love supporting a local business like this one. Thrilled they were open today.

Lots of gifts in their cellar door store as well such as chocolates and candles.

Be sure to stop by and enjoy a glass on the patio. It’s calm and scenic, just what the dr ordered!

Thanks!!! A+++++++

name: J Nab
text:
Since opening, we have been coming to the upstairs balcony as a first stop when visiting down South. We recommend this place to all of our friends and family, and have never had a bad review.

Would love to see a regular Spritz on the menu, to break things up (don't think poorly of us Larry - sorry LOL). Other than that, can't fault Cherubino.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your review J! We're so glad Cherubino has become a regular stop on your trips down south—and we appreciate you spreading the word. Noted on the Spritz… no judgement here (we’ll pass it on to Larry 😉). Looking forward to seeing you again soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Lih Herng Fong
text: Had a wonderful time at Cherubino today. Thank you Evie for fantastic service
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Claire Q
text:
大家我替你们来过了，非常不推荐这家品酒，小红书看看其他的吧，服务很糟糕。有个女服务生体现了土澳的别样特色…

We came here on the weekend for a relaxing getaway and had just enjoyed a lovely lunch at the restaurant next door.

We were planning to buy several bottles of wine to bring home for our friends, but as soon as we walked into the winery, the lady with short hair, bangs, and dark red lipstick greeted us with a very cold tone and face completely killed the mood.

She seemed quite unfriendly and even a bit rude toward foreign visitors, which was really disappointing after such a pleasant meal.
I don’t think I’ll be coming back, but I do hope they’ll treat other guests with more warmth in the future.
textTranslated:
Everyone, I've been here for you. I highly recommend this wine tasting. Check out other options on Xiaohongshu. The service was terrible. One waitress embodied the unique character of Tuao...

We came here on the weekend for a relaxing getaway and had just enjoyed a lovely lunch at the restaurant next door.

We were planning to buy several bottles of wine to bring home for our friends, but as soon as we walked into the winery, the lady with short hair, bangs, and dark red lipstick greeted us with a very cold tone and face, completely killing our mood.

She seemed quite unfriendly and even a bit rude toward foreign visitors, which was really disappointing after such a pleasant meal.
I don't think I'll be coming back, but I do hope they'll treat other guests with more warmth in the future.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback, Claire. We're very sorry to hear that your experience at the cellar door didn’t feel welcoming. That’s not the kind of impression we want to leave—especially following what should have been a relaxed day out. Your comments have been shared with our team so we can follow up internally. We really appreciate you taking the time to let us know, and hope we can welcome you back another time to make it up to you.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Luke Shand
text: Had an amazing wine tasting at experience at Cherubino. The grounds and the cellar were stunning. Pablo led our tasting and was very knowledgeable and friendly. Would really recommend popping in if your in market river.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thanks for your feedback Luke! 
We're so glad you enjoyed your tasting with Pablo—he’ll be happy to hear it🍷 Hope to see you again next time you’re in Margaret River!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Emma
text:
Absolutely stunning grounds, cellar door and beautiful wines.
We enjoyed a very detailed tasting with Evie which we thoroughly enjoyed! We can’t wait to be back again.
responseFromOwnerText: Ciao Emma, thank you for your feedback, we hope to welcome you back soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Rani George
text: Incredibly service, so informative! and of course , amazing wines
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Lucia Ray
text:
My favorite Margaret River area winery.
The perfect place to sit and relax for a while with a glass of wine and a stunning view.
The setting is nothing short of spectacular, and could be somewhere in Spain if you weren't aware of your actual location.
Try their Laissez Faire Grenache, please.
It is so good.🍷
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Lucia! We’re so glad you enjoy the setting—it’s always lovely to hear it brings a bit of Europe to Margaret River 🍷 Hope to see you again soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Maple Bacon
text: I used to come here regularly and enjoy a tasting and wine platter with people, it was a former favourite. Cherubino does some beautiful wines, I will say that. Sadly the last 2-3 experiences of the cellar door have been disappointing. I wouldn’t recommend going anymore. I have found the staff rude on the last 2-3 occasions, dismissive and even stating they cannot provide charcuterie boards because they are just too busy, when we booked ahead of time and it was well known a group of us were attending. This immediately followed by a group next to us receiving a charcuterie board. It was meant to be a 45 minute experience but we were waiting 1.5 hours for staff to pour us wines, which then meant we were late and missed our next location. Whilst we all agree the wine was nice, we felt we were treated poorly and I was embarrassed for recommending them. This was then followed by us being given the incorrect wine that we ordered, only to discover upon arriving home they had not given us what we asked for. I’m disappointed, and it’s not the first time in recent years. A real shame for why used to be a special and enjoyable venue. If management has changed, I’d recommend some re-evaluation.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Maple, thanks for taking the time to share your experience. We’re truly sorry to hear that your recent visits haven’t reflected the welcoming and enjoyable atmosphere you’ve come to expect from us. It’s especially disappointing to hear this from someone who has supported us over the years! 

Your comments around the service, communication, and order mix-up will be taken on board and followed up with our team.

We’d really appreciate the opportunity to follow up with you directly and make things right. If you're open to it, please get in touch with us at customer-care@cherubinowines.com. We value your feedback and would love the chance to restore your experience with us 🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Olivia Williams
text: I visited this place for my birthday to do a premium wine tasting. Unfortunately, the sommelier was subpar, and she made my friends and me feel unwelcome. The descriptions of the wines were also not very helpful, and the pours were not even close to being adequate. However, I want to express my gratitude to the older lady who looked after us after. You were amazing!
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Olivia, thanks for your feedback and for choosing to spend your birthday with us. We’re truly sorry parts of your tasting didn’t meet expectations and that you didn’t feel fully welcomed. Your kind words for Susie will certainly be passed on—she’ll be glad to know she made a difference. We appreciate you taking the time to share this with us and hope you had a lovely rest of your birthday🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Greg Bower
text:
Very nice, secluded property with very well-appointed guest houses. The house number 1 where we stayed was nice and clean upon arrival and felt very welcoming.
It was also great to meet the house manager too.
We highly recommend the guest houses to anyone wanting to enjoy a stay at Wilyabrup. The property with vines turning gold was a treat. Highly recommend Masseria restaurant.
Kind regards
Greg & Linda
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback, Greg & Linda! We’re so pleased you enjoyed a peaceful stay surrounded by the vineyard and felt well looked after during your time with us 🌿 Delighted to hear you also enjoyed dining at Masseria—hope to welcome you back soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: luke wilson
text: Was greeted with agression and passive aggressiveness by not one but two of the staff after being ignored for the first 10 minutes. Asked questions such as “did you just sit here”, you need to order at the bar”, “you need to be quick”, and “we are very busy” amongst other things. They were not busy and I am not sure what the rush was as we just wanted one glass each. It was 4pm. Always happy to ignore the fact that the septic tank had been backed up but hard to ignore rude service.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Luke, thanks for your feedback. We’re really sorry to hear about your experience—it’s certainly not the level of service we aim to provide. Your comments have been shared with the team to ensure this is addressed. Please feel free to reach out to us at customer-care@cherubinowines.com so we can follow up and offer you a better experience🍷 Thanks very much!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Archer McDonald
text: Very great experience. Eves knowledge of the wines were exceptional. A must try for some alternative Italian varieties.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Nicole Davidson
text:
We stayed at Cherubino’s Guest Houses for my partner’s 30th and booked all three houses for the weekend. The views were stunning, the houses were beautifully set up, and it felt like the perfect escape. The cellar door is just a short walk away and had a great wine selection. An ideal spot for a special occasion — we’ll definitely be back!

Thank you Cherubino’s team for an unforgettable stay!
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Nicole, thanks for your feedbackWe're so glad the guest houses made for a memorable 30th celebration and that everything felt just right for your weekend away 🌿 We'd love to welcome you back anytime!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Elena Panova
text: Eve was a knowledgeable, passionate and super informative kind host, making the wine and place come alive for my visit over in the cellar door. Huge thanks x
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Elena! We’re so glad Eve made your visit memorable—she’ll be thrilled to hear your kind words🍷 Hope to welcome you back again soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Emma S
text: Great tasting and delicious well priced wine. Thank you !
responseFromOwnerText: Glad you enjoyed it! Thank you for your review - see you next time :)
title: Churchview Estate

name: Nathan McIntosh
text: Very friendly and helpful. Good  range of wines with some really friendly furbabies to greet us. Would recommend for anyone to pull in and try the wine and enjoy the area on their way to or from Margaret River.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Nathan, thank you so much for your review, we are glad you enjoyed your visit with us!
title: Churchview Estate

name: Simon Bond
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Simon, thank you for your rating. We really appreciate your support and are glad you enjoyed your experience with us.
title: Churchview Estate

name: Daniel Hart
text: Very nice winery, thoroughly enjoyed the visit
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for the rating and review Daniel - glad you enjoyed it!
title: Churchview Estate

name: Stephen Glanz
text: What a Great stop - in the past we have drive past it and never stopped - so glad we did this time - service and staff were great and helpful. Wines are great value and good quality - purchased 5 bottles - had a cheese plater, my goodness what value and quality- all local- and was beautiful- I suggest you make it a stop when down south - make it a regular stop or multiple stop off place - going to be going again - don’t buy all the good wine - leave some for us.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review. We are glad you had a great experience with us.
title: Churchview Estate

name: Amanda Walker
text: Well what a fabulous find!! Staff fantastic,  friendly and very knowledgeable about the wines, ordered the picnic box which was delicious,  especially the chutney! Pet friendly  and just delightful! Looking forward to returning!!
responseFromOwnerText: Looking forward to seeing you again! We are glad you enjoyed the picnic.
title: Churchview Estate

name: Mark Walker
text:
1st time here, will definitely be back.
Wine tasting at outdoor table as we had our old Labrador Kingsley with us.
Picnic box was lovely.
responseFromOwnerText: Looking forward to seeing you and your gorgeous Labrador again! Thank you for the rating.
title: Churchview Estate

name: Briony Sinclair (Gidyeagirl)
text: Beautiful gardens and the wine is sublime.
responseFromOwnerText: We are glad you enjoyed it - thank you for the rating!
title: Churchview Estate

name: Jude Kelly
text: Eclectic range of really good organic wines ✔️, friendly & information packed tasting ✔️, just around the corner from home ✔️ Thanks Teresa for a great tasting 🍷😀
responseFromOwnerText: So great to see a friendly local face. Thank you for the review!
title: Churchview Estate

name: rodney manyara
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your 5-star rating Rodney - We really appreciate your support!
title: Churchview Estate

name: Justyna
text: Super ciepła i przyjazna atmosfera , pyszne wina. Przed przyjazdem do Australii polecam wyrobienie sobie passport Wine, dzięki któremu możecie dostać fajne rabaty przy zakupie win w określonych miejscach lub darmową degustację. Ten paszport zmotywował nas do odwiedzenia wielu lokalnych winiarni i zbierania pieczątek, podpisów, pysznych win i wspomnień. Polecam to miejsce
textTranslated: A super warm and friendly atmosphere, delicious wines. Before coming to Australia, I recommend getting a Wine Passport, which allows you to get great discounts on wine purchases at certain locations or a free tasting. This passport motivated us to visit many local wineries and collect stamps, signatures, delicious wines, and memories. I highly recommend this place.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: James Parry
text: Great place, great wine, wonderful staff. Very pleasant to sit on the deck and enjoy the view and a glass of wine.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Suzie Kerkin
text: Wendy is an enthusiastic lover of wine and Credaro are luck to have you. We thoroughly enjoyed our tasting experience on our Margaret River visit and we don't often leave reviews, here it was a must!. Thank you, Pietro and Suzie
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Peter S
text: Stunning winery venue ! The view and decor is beautiful and the wines are lovely. Good stop if in MR.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Annie Kenwery
text: Credaro is such a beautiful winery we keep coming back to. This time we did a tasting, brought a picnic and sat on the lawn soaking up the incredible view. It was such a special afternoon. Steve was lovely and really knowledgeable, which made the tasting even better. I especially loved the oakiness of the Chardonnay and Cab Sav in the 1000 Crowns series. Credaro is always a treat 🤍🍷
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: geoffrey knapp
text: Wonderful locally owned winery with fabulous view
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Cynthia McCleary
text: McKenzie ensured our tasting experience was excellent. She was attentive and knowledgeable but not in the least bit overbearing. Thank you McKenzie.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Dean Callanan
text:
Stunning location! We had an absolutely fabulous tasting with Mackenzie who was extremely knowledgeable and lovely!

Thanks team and Mackenzie!!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Monique Carmela
text: Incredible winery, the wines are amazing, their service is exceptional, thank you so much for having us. We were so blessed to be served by Steve on our last visit, and the experience was absolutely next level, one I’ll remember, will definitely be back again ❤️
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Celeste Beston
text:
We had a great tasting here, very friendly staff and their 1000 crown cab sav was amazing!
We will definitely be back.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Tony Moore
text: Great wines, great service.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Jason Zacher
text: A great place to experience Italian wines. Welcoming, and passionate service too. Very nice to taste wines overlooking the vineyards from above.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Shani J
text: Beautiful venue!!! Love the whites and bought a few; the reds I was not a fan of but obviously tastes vary!! The girl who did our tasting was lovely and knew a fair bit about the family history which was lovely to hear. Beautiful stunning grounds and a lovely possible wedding venue. I am shocked the place was empty apart from us and a small group. People are missing out. I even asked if you could order a cheese platter etc because the view is something else however there was no menu. $20 per tasting was a bit much however and I was shocked but this was comped as we bought wines!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Anna Walker
text:
Randomly came across this winery on our way to Gracetown, and what a fantastic find! From the moment we walked through the door, we were greeted with a warm, homely atmosphere.

Steve, who welcomed us, was an absolute gem—friendly, knowledgeable, and genuinely passionate about the family history and wines.

The wine tasting experience was excellent, and we couldn’t resist purchasing a few bottles to take home. It was the perfect way to kick off our adventure around the area. Steve is truly an asset to the team—top bloke!

Highly recommend stopping by if you’re in the region.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Mark Langridge
text: One of the best winery experiences on our south west visit. Stunning views, passionate, knowledgeable staff and sensational wine
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Lynn Sadler
text: Exceptional advice and service by McKenzie during our wine tasting for 3 people yesterday. Elegant setting, gorgeous views
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Mary Finnigan
text: Credaro Family Estate was such a huge highlight of our trip. My friends came from Sydney to Perth to visit, so my goal was to show them all of the wonders of Margaret River. WELL the jewel in the crown of Margaret River is this place. My friends are the biggest wine snobs ever having been to Napa Valley, New Zealand, Hunter Valley & Mudgee exclusively on wine trips & they all said the wines were incredible. They all bought 3 bottles each. It was hard to distinguish between how they could possibly keep getting better. I myself was not drinking. What should have been a bit of a boring experience for me as the sober one was made wonderful by the incredible service provided by Steve. Steve made me a cup of English Breakfast tea to enjoy on the terrace & really went the extra mile to make sure it was a good brew. (This is so important to a Northerner) he was incredibly informative, passionate & so very funny too! “This wine is good for 20 years..in my house it lasts about 20 minutes”. We were treated like royalty and it really made me proud to be representing the West. Thank you Steve. You are the best in the west & we bloody love you.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Marianne Huigen
text: Geweldig, thank you steve!!
textTranslated: Awesome, thank you steve!!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Sue Fox
text: We spent a lovely afternoon here. Amazing staff, especially McKenzie. Everyone should visit.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Benjamin George
text: Fantastic experience - excellent wines and beautiful venue! Evie was exceptionally informative and very kind.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Benjamin! Hope to welcome you back soon 🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Michael Gresham
text: Evie expertly took us on a journey through the premium list without the pretends. Great wines and a great experience.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Michael! We're glad you had a great tasting with Evie—she’ll be happy to hear your kind words 🍷 Hope to welcome you back soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Max Horowitz
text: Amazing wine tasting experience, Evie in particular was great, so knowledgeable about all the wines and really good personalised recommendations, would recommend
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Max! We're so pleased you enjoyed the tasting—Evie will be thrilled to hear your kind words. Hope to see you again soon.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Lauren Huyton
text:
Alittle bit of a mixed review. We started off really enjoying our wine tasting , the young blonde lady was very welcoming and kind and we both felt like we can have fun with this tasting as my partner and i always do - it doesn’t have to be such a serious activity !

However half way through our tasting a lady who seemed to be in management or head of staff seemed a bit judgy that we’re were bouncing from reds to whites ( which we were fine with - it’s all for fun and enjoyment) making the comment “oh that’s interesting”. I wouldn’t have too much of an issue with this however it became extremely uncomfortable when we saw her correcting her staff not too far from us and we could tell our blonde server (and i apologise for not remembering her name) was not the same confident lady we had. If you correct staff please do it out of sight of your patrons and any unnecessary comments shouldn’t be said aloud. That experience made us rather uncomfortable and felt like how we do our wine tastings was just utterly wrong and that is not the case - each to their own ! It’s for enjoyment. It is a shame as we were looking forward to having a seat outside with their antipasti platter with some more wine but by the end of it we just wanted to leave .

Thank you to blonde server who had a laugh with us and was so open and kind !
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Lauren. We're really sorry to hear your experience became uncomfortable—we absolutely agree that wine tasting should be about enjoyment! Your comments have been shared with the team to ensure we create a more welcoming environment for all guests 🍷 We appreciate you taking the time to let us know.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Justine Cherubino
text:
A perfect spacious stylish well appointed comfortable private guest house in an a stunning location where you are immersed in nature ,with Cherubino Winery and restaurant Masseira by Cherubino both within easy walking distance.
A fantastic base from which to explore the stunning South West WA.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Neriman Gjini
text: I visited for a wine tasting and was hoping to speak with someone about it. Several staff member walked by, but not a single one acknowledged me - not even a single hello. It felt incredibly rude and unwelcoming.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Neriman. We’re really sorry to hear about your experience—it’s certainly not the welcome we aim to provide. Your comments have been shared with the team, and we’ll be working to ensure this doesn’t happen again🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Marigijey
text: Extremely rude staff!
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Marigijey. We're sorry to hear your experience didn’t reflect the standard of hospitality we aim for. Your comments have been noted and will be followed up with the team.
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Jono Lilley
text: We had a great time at our wine tasting with Evie. Our tastes were taken into consideration to curate a custom experience. Evie was friendly and knowledgeable. Not to mention that the wines were exquisite. The Uovo range is fantastic, and my favourite wine was the Uovo Chardonnay. Perfect for a sunny autumn day. Thanks Evie for a wonderful adventure.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Jono! We're so glad you had a great tasting experience with Evie—she’ll be thrilled to hear it! Hope to welcome you back again soon 🍷
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Dave Gray
text: We had an excellent wine tasting yesterday when we visited with Matt from Pour and Explore. Evie guided us through the tasting and from the very first wine it was obvious she had listened to our preferences. I happen to like Italian and Spanish varietals and Evie’s selections were perfect. We had the Fiano and the Arneis whites both were exquisite. The reds their Grenache, the Mencia the Omagio and an interesting Touriga blend. All the wines showed great originality and much care goes into the wine making process. As for Evie her care and attention really made the visit special.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Dave!hThanks for your feedback. We're so pleased you enjoyed your tasting with Evie—hope to see you again soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Boriz Bykoff
text:
We had a fantastic stay at Cherubino Guest House—the perfect spot for a relaxing weekend away with the kids. The amenities were excellent, making our stay comfortable and stress-free. One of the highlights was the beautiful outdoor space, with plenty of grassed areas for the kids to run around and play. It truly felt like a peaceful retreat, surrounded by nature yet close enough to explore the region.

The accommodation was well-maintained, clean, and thoughtfully designed, ensuring a cozy and enjoyable experience. Whether you're looking for a quiet escape or a family-friendly getaway, this place ticks all the boxes. Highly recommend and will definitely be returning!
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your feedback Boris! We’re so glad you and the family had a relaxing stay and made the most of the space🌿 Great to hear the guest house felt like a true retreat—hope to welcome you back soon!
title: Cherubino Cellar Door & Guest Houses

name: Francesca Ardino
text: My parents just arrived from Italy and this was our first winery. I have to say that the Wine is wonderful, and Steve, the host is simply the best. Mum and Dad are very impressed with the kindness and welcoming. We will see you again. Thank you so much
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Luke van der Beeke
text: Nicely presented winery with suitably friendly hosts. However, we weren’t able to purchase the wine we came for unless we joined their wine club. We did not wish to do so, and despite our best efforts we were refused. Tasting menu is pricey ($15pp basic, $20 premium), and the two of our party who did the tasting menu didn’t like any of the wines, noting they were too acidic and lacked complexity. That said, taste is a personal preference, and I’m sure there are some nice wines to be had here.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Marcelle Campbell
text: We visited for a wine tasting & to view the estate for a wedding venue. Mackenzie went above & beyond with perfect service, a personal tour & left us all feeling welcomed & very informed. We had an amazing experience. Thank-you Mackenzie :)
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Stephanie Garner
text: Absolutely wonderful tasting experience. Mackenzie and Steve were fantastic and very accommodating. Would absolutely recommend stopping. Great value!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Clodagh Berryman
text: A wonderful wine tasting experience with  the company of Steve Jansen. He was informative, witty,friendly and made our time a superb experience.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Melissa OToole
text: We had a fabulous experience today at this beautiful property. Steve and Mackenzie made us feel special, we were given a tour of the property, and told all about the Credaro Family. We enjoyed most of the wines we tasted, signed up as a member, took a few with us and look forward to our case of wine being delivered once we arrive home after our holiday. We so enjoyed Steve’s knowledge of the wines, and the area. His friendly nature, from the moment we were greeted when we walked in. Thank you, Paul and Melissa, Broke, Hunter Valley NSW
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Brooke Olliver-Burnside
text: This winery is not to be missed! The wine and company was exceptional, with wonderful Steve at the helm. Sitting out on the porch, pounding Sangiovese and taking in the vines is a 20/10 experience. Would have been 25/10 if it wasn’t for Rhys but these things can’t be helped.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Lauren Wonders
text: Steve was such a delight! And the wine was so incredible! Honestly, couldn’t decide which one to get (sadly only had the budget for one bottle or would’ve got them all). Rhys (Steve’s son in law) was a bit weird but makes great wine.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Josh Duncan
text: Amazing wines, amazing views and Steve was an absolute legend who made us feel so welcomed! Rhys was a bit of a weird dude but his wines are absolutely amazing!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Lady M
text: This place is so beautiful. It really is the perfect wedding venue. I can't vouch for food but the wine tasting was generous and we were the only ones there the day and time we visited, like a VIP experience.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: erinablitt
text: Had an amazing experience with Steven on Saturday with 2 girlfriends. So much wine knowledge and fabulous wines. Thank you for a great morning/afternoon!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Rebecca Cohen
text: Dropped by for wine tasting. Rhys gave us 5 star service. Top wine, location, experience.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Andre Karl Misso
text: Came for the sparkling Chardonnay. Amazing! Lovely!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Zali Vigus
text: very knowledgeable and friendly service with gorgeous views!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Dahna Howard
text: Knowledgeable and friendly service from the man at credaro wines, was a great experience!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Hayley Davis
text:
We want to extend a huge thank you to Lucy and the Credaro team for ensuring our Wedding day was absolutely perfect!
Lucy was an absolute delight to work with, she was on the ball and ensured our guests were looked after on the day. Cannot thank you enough Lucy!
PSA if you are thinking of getting married at Credaro... DO IT!
Also our dog was able to be present on our special day which was so incredible, we wish we could do it all over again :D x
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Britt Luca
text: Lucy at Credaro is an absolute wedding wizard! The venue here was absolutely incredible for our special day too. The planning leading up to the day was made so much easier by the expertise of Lucy, she kept a stressful process seamless and her and her team absolutely nailed the execution of our wedding. Her organisation made the day run so smoothly and made me feel so much more relaxed. Thank you team!
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Carla De Pasquale
text: Lovely cellar door and tasting experience
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Lull Floral
text: One of our favourite weddings, amazing venue, fun couple and we got to set up some beautiful flowers too
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: teakay Jefferson
text: We had a great experience here today. Sadly I did not catch the wonderful staff member’s name but she was was polite and professional and really knew her wines. Thank you!!!! Would like to buy more but too many can not be taken in plane.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: John Foreman
text: What disappointment. They now offer two tasting flights: $10 & $15. Yes you buy & it costs nothing. However the three wines I wanted to taste were not on either list. The server “gave” me a taste of one of them. I get they are on the strip, but on previous visits there was nothing like this. Ironically they rang the day before to tell me about specials, I replied not to worry, I’d drop in. Probably won’t be back. Oh, and I did buy two of the one I tasted.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: 4SUREDROPS
text:
Atmosphere VERY AVE.
Would recommend
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Peter Couchman
text: stunning
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Nick Fischer
text: Great wine tasting experience
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Helen Parry
text: Did a quick wine tasting Saturday that was the best experience I have had here in SW.   Very accommodating staff who made our group of 8 very welcome.  Lovely view and outdoor sunshine. Great wines made it easy to buy on the way out.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Kellie Bales
text: My partner and I randomly stumbled upon this winery on the busy long weekend. We were immediately greeted and welcomed by Claire. Claire was genuine, informative and engaging, she truly made our afternoon. She handled a “full house” with grace.  We bought two bottles of wine for our evening but wish we bought more!! We will be back. The wines at Credaro are incredible, as is the setting but for us Claire set this winery apart from others.
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Graeme Wing
text: Great place, lovely wines and amazing service
title: Credaro Family Estate

name: Waks
text: Tons of parking, beautiful cellar door and grounds and then there's the food and wine !!  Wide selection of wine varietals going back to to 50 year old vibes and the food is amazing. Great work team CS 🙌🍷

name: Claire Oakes
text:
What an amazing day we had… 1st we started with a sit down tasting, Nat our host was so knowledgeable with the wine and prepared tasting based on what styles of wine we normally drink..
Then the food , talk about explosion of flavours my taste buds where in heaven and once again the service was impeccable..
Nat is certainly an asset to the team as is the chef..
Would highly recommend and I’ll definitely be back.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Claire. What a great review, thank you for sharing your thoughts on your last visit! We will pass your kind words on to Nat and the chefs - we agree that they are great!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Sam H
text: What an amazing spot for a drink and delicious meal! The service from Nat and Gilles was spectacular. If you are served by either of these 2 you’re in for a treat, especially Gilles’s knowledge of the wines! Food was absolutely divine, the Ironstone Block Old Vine Cabernet Sauvignon was so smooth and delicious.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Sam. What a lovely review, thank you! I have shared it with Gilles and Nat!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Barbara Kounis

title: Clairault Streicker

name: Cy Fort
text: My clients loved there experience. Thanks
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for the great review!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Fran Cormack
text:
Edit Feb 2026:
Our first time having lunch. And maybe we caught the restaurant on an off day. It took over 20 minutes after being seated to be asked if we would like a drink. Apparently the iPad system showed us on a different table. Through the course of lunch we got a different tables entree. A different tables wine. We got asked if we had ordered soft drinks at one point.

The food was good, not the standard we expect from a restaurant in Margaret River.

Only called in for a tasting and was very impressed. A great selection of wines to choose from. The restaurant looks great too so we may have to return.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Fran. Great to hear that you enjoyed your wine tastings and sorry to hear your lunch was not as good as it could have been. Valentines day was a very busy day for the team!
title: Clairault Streicker

responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Joachim - I hope you both enjoy the rest of your holiday!
title: Clairault Streicker

text: Had an awesome wine tasting with a perfect view. This place is a must-do here in this area.

text: Even though it was busy the day we visited, Sam who looked after us was super attentive, friendly and attentive. We loved ordering the wines in a flight to taste at our own pace while we enjoyed the beautiful surrounds. The Chardonnays, Chenin and Cabernet here are always amazing 🍷

Wonderful Vineyard Picnic experience! The food was delicious, enjoyed with a great red in the beautiful grounds of the Clairault Streicher vineyard.
The staff super obliging.
Highly recommend.

name: Stephen Purkis
text: Just went for a tasting and their 3 course lunch.  This would have been a great experience and received 5 star had it not been for the poor behaviour of 5 children who accompanied 3 adults. It felt like we were in a McDonald's, not the type of experience we were seeking.  :(  Further, the owners say they're sorry for the experience but it's not in their control. I call BS on that. Absolutely within their control as they could have sat that group outside instead waiting for us to almost finish our meal before they were relocated. Weak response.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Stephen, 
It is great to hear that you had a 5-star food and service experience! I am really sorry that you left a 3 star review for our team due to things outside of our control.
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Amanda Rowe - Celebrant
text:
Outstanding… Friday long lunch!
Beautiful food, great service, delicious vino!
Thankyou x

title: Clairault Streicker

name: Rowan Addison
text: I’ll be honest, had never heard of this winery but, visiting from NSW, my wife and I were driving past at about 11.30am really in search of a coffee so decided to call in. I know, who goes to a winery for a coffee right? I was embarrassed even to ask but we were warmly welcomed, offered a seat in the lounge area and served a perfect coffee. The feel of the place, the friendly, welcoming and helpful service were all so good that we ended up staying for a tasting. Impressive wines, bought two bottles only due to travel restraints but could have bought many more. Keen to try the restaurant one day. Beautiful surroundings and cellar door. It’s well worth a visit.
responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Rowan. Thank you for your lovely review - great coffee and great wine goes hand in hand so we are pleased we could offer you both! 
We look forward to seeing you for lunch next time you visit the region!

name: Katharina Klepatsch
text:
We did the quick tasting: five wines in total — two reds, two whites, and one rosé.
The winery works according to the moon cycles and follows biodynamic principles, which was very interesting. For me, it’s one of the highlights for white wines in Margaret River.

text: We went on the spiral garden and wine tasting tour. Cristian was a fantastic tour guide and we loved their fresh take on linking biodiversity to the wines that we tried. The service was exceptional and that make both the tour and wine tasting a memorable event on our trip through the Margaret River region.

name: JD

name: Miriam Bak McKenna
text:
I rarely leave reviews after a poor service experience, but for Cullen I’ll make an exception. Our server was rude and inattentive, to the point that a colleague had to step in and assist us. We were given very little information about the wines we were tasting and left feeling unwelcome overall.

The tasting was $15 per person, and despite purchasing two of their most expensive bottles, we were still told we needed to pay for an additional tasting. Given the reputation of this winery, the level of service was extremely disappointing.
title: Cullen Wines

name: Mark Walpole
text: I had a great tasting with Simona recently. Very knowledgeable and was able to answer all my questions relating to the winemaking techniques used in the production of the different wines. If you're planning a visit, seek her out!

name: Super Nova
text:
Staff have no local knowledge and are not here for the long haul. They were your very average back packers type staff who kept talking in their local language amongst themselves rather than explaining the wines and making wine tasting a good experience for the customer. Cullen wines are good actually but unfortunately selection of staff is not upto mark.
Visited: Sunday arvo, 23rd November 2025
title: Cullen Wines

name: Gary Joubert
text: We had a delightful adventure of the Cullen winery. Our host Diego was very knowledgable and very entertaining. The wines we tasted were excellent range from Chardonnay‘s, Sauvignon Blanc Semillon, Red wine, including the Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot and some limited release or vintages. Diego made it fun by giving blind tastings to see whether we could tell the year and type of wine. Truly a fun experience!!  I would recommend taking the opportunity to go to this winery!
title: Cullen Wines

name: Jay Jayaganesh
text: Very nice winery, good drops.

name: T S
text: Wine tasting with Christian was amazing. Very knowledgeable and passionate about biodynamic wine 10/10
title: Cullen Wines

name: J Nab
text:
We had a terrific experience at the Cullen Biodynamic Dining Room. We had the four-course set menu, and sat outside with a view overlooking the winery.

The welcome snacks are a perfect way to start off the experience. The staff knew exactly what wines to recommend, and were all over the menu, we enjoyed walking around the veggie garden too. Standout dishes for us were the Duck entree and the Wagyu main.

A must visit for lunch when down South, we will be back.
title: Cullen Wines

name: V R
text: Margaret River’s first winery apparently. Christian was an amazing host and has a wealth and abundance of knowledge about all things wines. Didn’t realise that grapes were picked between certain dates based on the lunar calendar. I’ve learnt something new today thanks to Christian!

name: Louise Harvey
text: Wonderful wines and a great cellar door for tastings! Service was super welcoming, knowledgeable and everything we tasted was excellent! This is a must visit in Margaret River!

Cullen wines is a national treasure.

text:
We’d been looking forward to visiting Cullen for a while and finally made the trip over from interstate to do a tasting and lunch, so we were really hoping for a special experience. Unfortunately, it didn’t live up to our expectations and sadly we were forced to skip our tasting after lunch, primarily due to the poor handling of our experience by their team.

Cullen has a good reputation for their wines, so maybe we just caught them on an off day - but overall, the cellar door experience and meal didn’t feel like it lived up to the name or price.

I’d recommend choosing something else in the region for lunch, and only perhaps consider a stop for a tasting if you have lots of time to spare.  The other low Google reviews regarding service reflect our experience.

text:
⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ An absolute gem in the Margaret River wine region! ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

We had a fantastic experience at Clairault Streicker. The setting is stunning—beautifully landscaped gardens and a peaceful outdoor area perfect for relaxing with a glass of wine.

The wine tasting was exceptional, with knowledgeable and friendly staff. We also enjoyed a delicious lunch—fresh, seasonal, and beautifully presented.

It’s the perfect mix of premium wines, warm hospitality, and gorgeous scenery. Highly recommend stopping by if you’re in the area!
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Chrissy - we are very happy that you enjoyed your visit! Hopefully we will see you back again soon!

text: Staff are absolutely wonderful, really enjoyed our cellar door tasting  today with Phil!
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Jessi. Thank you for your review, great to hear that you enjoyed your tasting with Phil!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Cori M
text: We are world travelers from US and wine connoisseurs.  Enjoyed both the wine tasting and lunch and had an amazing experience at the beautiful Clairault Streicker winery.  We were welcomed and impressed from the first second we entered until the last bite and drop!   Phil Cowley was our wine tasting expert and we truly appreciated his knowledge of the wines, local stories and recommendations.  Lunch was also a delight, unforgettable fois gras and lamb chased by exquisite 2012 Ironstone block old vine cab.  One can sense the attention to detail from the well kept estate and grape vine hills, masterfully done wines, winery building and surrounding gardens to the rigor of the staff training and skilled kitchen chefs. Thank you Phil and staff for an unforgettable experience and compliments to the chef.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Cori. Thank you for your great review! Your positive words mean a lot to Phil and the team, thank you for taking the time to share all the details of your visit.
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Claudia Marllery Maurer
text: Excellent from the chef to the gentleman and ladies highly recommended 👍🏻 👌🏻🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Claudia. Thanks for the review, great to hear you enjoyed your visit!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Kim Boothman
text:
This is one of my favourite wineries in the South West! Not only do they have outstanding wine (Hellllooooo Queen Chardy and King Cabernet), but they have an amazing restaurant.

The surroundings and vibe are classic down south winery with a fireplace for winter and a beautiful outside area with a view into the vineyard for summer- and live music!

But the kicker...The chef has absolutely nailed the menu! It's the perfect balance between very fancy food and a brewery menu; a degastation menu which costs too much (and has too much food in it) and a winery with just platters; and the option to have a long three course lunch or just a few nibbles to go with your wine tasting.

I thought the three course set menu for $80 is at the correct price point and just the right amount of food. You get to choose an entree, a main and a dessert (and can match wines if you choose). Warm, freshly cooked focaccia was part of the deal and this bread is seriously the best bread I've ever had! I could not fault the food throughout our lunch. The staff went above and beyond to make sure one of our party who was a vegetarian and gluten intolerant also had some great options to enjoy their meal too.

Thank you Clairault Streicker for having that perfect balance at your restaurant. Big high fives for the chef and his team! I can't wait to come back next season when the menu changes.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Kim. What a lovely review, thank you for letting us know how much you enjoyed your visit!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Amy Gates
text: We had a wonderful lunch on the deck and admired the beautiful grounds of Clairault Streicker. The stand out dishes were the patè and the fish main, and the bread was amazing. We enjoyed tasting the wines; our favourites were the sparkling, syrah and chardonnay, and we couldn't resist bringing a few bottles home. The staff were all friendly and knowledgeable, and I would highly recommend visiting for wine tasting and lunch.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Amy, great to hear you enjoyed your lunch and our wines!
title: Clairault Streicker

name: Glen Knight
text:
I took my girlfriend for a lovely romantic lunch at Clairault Streicker last week, and I must say it was one of the best dining experiences I've had in the south west. We started with an informed wine tasting with the lovely Cara, every wine we tried was delicious. It was had to pick my favourite but I went with the Streicker 2019 old vine Cabernet. We were then taken outside onto the deck by Ulrika and seated at the best table in the house, with uninterrupted views of the native bush and vineyards , not to mention the manicured lawns.
We chose the 3 course long lunch and started with a glass of sparkling each. Our entrees came out in a timely manner , my girlfriend had the duck liver parfait while I chose the salmon. Both were delicious and looked like a colourful masterpiece.
This was followed up with a glass of SBS for my girlfriend who had chosen the fish of the day and a glass of the Streicker Cabernet that I had tasted earlier to match my choice of Lamb. Both dishes were again superb and I must say paired perfectly with our choice of wines .
Finally we came to dessert . We ordered the cane cut Sauvignon Blanc Semillon , a decadent sticky wine. From the menu I chose the chocolate brownie , no ordinary brownie , this was to die for.
My girl ordered the pear and frangipane tart with creme anglaise . This was also delicious as I had to steal some .
All in all it was a fantastic fine dining experience I would definitely recommend. Awesome food , great wine , beautiful location and staff that were positive and helpful.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your great review Glen, we are glad that you and your girlfriend enjoyed your visit! We look forward to seeing you both again soon!
title: Clairault Streicker

I highly recommend this experience to anyone looking to learn more about wine and have a fun and interactive experience. Can't wait to go back and blend again! - thanks so much!

name: L S
text:
After visiting many wineries around Margaret River, we were genuinely surprised to find this simple yet stylish tasting room tucked next to Cheeky Monkey Brewery. Their offer of eight generous wine tastings plus two cheeses and crackers of your choice for $50 was an absolute standout, nothing else we tried came close.

You can sit outdoors with a beautiful view and even order extra food from the brewery, which is a huge bonus considering most wineries don’t offer any food at all, not even cheese platters. The wines were excellent, and we’ll definitely be back on our next visit.

And if you’re travelling with kids, the playground is a game-changer.
