Can do a really good wine tasting
Very nice wines !
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your lovely review T G - glad you enjoyed our wines and service.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Elias Chala Saad
text: The place is nice. The service is terrible. We waited for 15 minutes, they ignored us, so we left without the wine tasting.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Elias, so sorry we weren't able to provide your group with our usual service on your recent visit. Thanks for visiting and we hope the rest of your Margaret River experience was great.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Colleen Dixon
text: They do things a little differently here. Tastings come with a cheese or charcuterie board.  Prices ($15 each for tastings of 6 medium and premium wines, and $39 for a board for two) compare favourably--but the wines are wonderful, and the boards really well and generously put together with all the little extras, locally sourced.  As an anchor to your serious Margaret River tasting day, it can't be beat.  Highly recommend.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Colleen  we are truly grateful to be so well appreciated for our efforts to stand out from the crowd. Wonderful to know others feel the same about our offerings and wine. We look forward to welcoming you again soon. Thank you.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: L1its L1its
text: We had an exceptional experience today at Domaine Naturaliste. Impeccable service and tasting by Erica, sensational wine and food, gorgeous venue. An absolute must if you are visiting the region.
responseFromOwnerText: We really appreciate your kind review and hope to see you again. Best regards from the Cellar Door team.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Nicole Duncan
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Nicole
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Fab
text: Beautiful wines, cellar door and staff. Would highly reccommend the wines and the visit
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Fab, so glad you enjoyed your visit.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Belinda Hockings
text: Just popped in for a glass of wine and wished we had more time to do the tasting, staff were so lovely, they let us taste 3 wines before choosing which one we were going to have. Setting was lovely, the outside lawn area had families enjoying the lovely weather and inside the cellar door had a nice vibe as well.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Belinda we loved your review and are so glad you enjoyed your experience. We hope you can spend more time with us on your next visit. Thanks
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Yiğit Ayaz
text: Really nice wines, especially the one that I shared in the photo
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your lovely review Yigit.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Campbell Smyth
text: Fabulous wine experience, I have enjoyed DN wines for years and the new vintage is even better. The staff are extremely helpful and knowledgeable and enthusiastically do their best to serve people even when the room is busy. A tip to newbies to this vineyard; make a booking as it is getting recognised as one of the best in Margaret River. I particularly enjoyed the Artus and the tasting plate.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Campbell, thats a fantastic review thanks. Hope to see you again soon. All the best.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Aaron Stone
text: Terrible experience. We were completely neglected by our server during our tasting session. We were originally alone with her but then another group came in and stated that they wanted to join their wine club and then we were totally ignored. We were waiting up to ten minutes between tastings. She then decided to abruptly end her shift once she had finished signing up the other people to the wine club and left us with her manager, who wasn’t really any better. She served us a signature wine without telling us it would cost extra and then charged us for it. Will never return. Extremely disappointing when you’re trying to showcase Margaret River to your Canadian friends and you get service like this.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Aaron we are sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy your experience and apologise that you didn't receive the typical service we offer. We hope the rest of your visit to the region was outstanding.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: colin jones
text: we received fantastic service and a lovely shared mixed platter for lunch with some lovely wine tasting. great service and great staff. Add this to your list of places to visit
responseFromOwnerText: So glad you enjoyed everything about your visit Colin and we appreciate your kind review. May your glass be forever half full of great wine!
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Chantelle Skinner
text: Hands down the best experience had at a winery to date. Being a Southwest local for many years and having visited several wineries in the beautiful Margaret River region and overseas I have to say I have never experienced such great customer service nor received such a wealth of information regarding not only the history and story behind the wines but details I had never received from any other cellar door. Erika your boss should cherish you as an employee because great customer service is very rare and you need to be commended for the service you give. I will be back for certain. Well done Domaine Naturaliste you guys deserve an award. 🙌
responseFromOwnerText: What a fabulous review Chantelle thanks so much! Getting reviews like this is an award from our perspective. We are truly blessed to have our fabulous service team, who we do really appreciate. We look forward to your next visit. All the best for the Festive Season and 2025.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Aidan Thatcher
text: A fabulous experience with very well priced wines. Pascale was lovely and friendly and made our afternoon. Thank you!
responseFromOwnerText: We are so pleased to read you had such a great time at Domaine Naturaliste, thanks Aidan. We hope to see you again soon. All the best for the Festive Season.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Jared Rondeau
text: We had an amazing time at Domaine Naturaliste with Erica! She was so knowledgeable and personal and made us feel right home ! Wine and mixed platter were exceptional and we would happily come back again. Sad we couldn’t steal Erica away as our new bestie :)
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Jared we are so glad you enjoyed your experience so much and appreciate you taking the time to give such a lovely review. We are truly blessed with our amazing team members at Cellar Door.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Jill Downie
text: Great wine tasting and charcuterie board.Very knowledgeable staff.Thanks Pascale for a great introduction to Domaine Naturaliste
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for your lovely review Jill. It's great to receive such feedback. We are truly blessed with our Cellar Door team members.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Cam Waters
text: Lovely wines, the Chardonnay is lovely,  and the ladies assisting with the tasting were excellent,  very knowledgeable on their wines
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Cam we are so glad you enjoyed your Cellar Door experience and our wines and thanks for taking the time to give us a lovely review. We hope to see you again. Cheers
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Amanda Bell
text:
My partner took me to Domaine for my birthday a few months ago and we had such a great experience.
The staff were so welcoming and friendly, they really stood out as a highlight for us.
The charcuterie board was delicious as were the wines, particularly the Chardonnay’s!
It’s a beautiful setting and lovely purpose built building.
I can’t wait to return!
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Amanda we are so glad you enjoyed your visit on your special day and appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We look forward to hosting you again. Thanks
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Calvin White
text:
Bloody great wine! We did a tasting whilst passing through Margaret River and got served by the winemaker. Great chat and great wines ...took away a bottle of 'rojo'.

If you time your visit right you can also cop a burger from 'normal van'. These were 11/10 and a glass of red with a burger is just heaven 😍
address: 1/1 Boodjidup Rd, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia
title: Dormilona

name: Joseph Liu
text: Great orange wine.  Try skin contact a must
address: 1/1 Boodjidup Rd, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia
title: Dormilona

name: Georgia W
text: Great wines with modern twists, owner is really genuine and enthusiastic which brings such authenticity
address: 1/1 Boodjidup Rd, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia
title: Dormilona

name: Rohan Smith
address: 1/1 Boodjidup Rd, Margaret River WA 6285, Australia
title: Dormilona

name: Karen Graham
text:
We enjoyed a glass of wine and a cheese & charcuterie board over the long weekend. Quality produce and a delightful setting.
We arrived at 11 am and were 2 of 4 people at the winery. Was great to just sit and relax however we felt the stools weren't high enough for the style of table.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for taking the time to give us such a lovely review Karen. We hope to see you again.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Alexander Polglaze
text: Great views across the vineyard.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Barinderjit Mehra
text: Lovely crafted Wine with great aroma and luscious taste. Thanks for the bottle bruce.
responseFromOwnerText: You're welcome Barinderjit and thanks for the kind review.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Gihan Perera
text: We booked a tasting flight with a charcuterie plate and had a fabulous experience. Staff were friendly, knowledgeable, didn't rush us at all. A highlight of our trip down south.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for taking the time to give us such a positive review Gihan. We look forward to welcoming you back soon.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Carole Agl immobilier
text:
Très jolie expérience avec Pascale et Jeff ! De très bons vins, un plateau de charcuterie et fromages délicieux, nous avons passé un merveilleux moment.
Encore merci !
textTranslated:
A wonderful experience with Pascale and Jeff! Excellent wines, a delicious charcuterie and cheese platter—we had a marvelous time.
Thank you again!
responseFromOwnerText: Mercie bien Carole pour votre belle critique. Nous sommes très heureux que vous ayez apprécié votre expérience avec notre charmante équipe.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Maëva Dal Maso
text: We went to Domaine Naturaliste for a wine testing, it's a beautiful winery, and it was a great experience, thanks to Pascale who was so nice, helpful, and lovely ! We really enjoyed this moment
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for visiting and sharing your review Maeva. We are indeed blessed with our location and team members!
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Julie Winter
text: Beautiful grounds and wonderful wines, especially their whites (and I’m usually a fan of reds only). The lower rating is only because we had a last minute addition to our group on the wine tour so there was one more than the table was set for. The woman that greeted was completely inflexible and refused to accommodate the additional person, even just to stand at the table. Such an odd reaction. I will say that the wines were very good and she did such a fabulous job guiding us through the tasting that they won back a star. I suppose the moral of the story is be able to pivot when you’re in a customer centric role because the person you cut out might be the one that writes reviews 😬
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks for visiting us on your wine tour Julie. We hope that should you visit again, you will book with us directly so we can explain the offerings available based on guest numbers and visit times. Great that you loved our wines, thanks.
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Elise Williams
text: A fantastic winery with lovely staff - the Discovery range is excellent value, but their higher end wines are exceptional too. Highly recommended.
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks so much for visiting us Elise, and for your great review! It's so lovely to get this kind of feedback. We hope to see you again soon. Cheers
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Skye Pascoe
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Skye
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Miranda Stocco
responseFromOwnerText: Thanks Miranda
title: Domaine Naturaliste

name: Antonius Tony Franciscus van Maanenberg
text: We received a very warm welcome here by the owners and the fragrant smoke of the pizza oven just added to the ambience of this estate.  The wine tasting was paired with a tasty platter of antipasti meats, cheese, crackers, and fruit. The journey from our cruise ship was really worthwhile and our guests in our minibus weren't disappointed with the Australian hospitality.  Thank you Driftwood Estate and also for the awesome T-shirt, people comment about it a lot.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Mikk Leiner
text: Tasty wines, friendly owners, delicious pizza. Highly recommended.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Lucy Burrow
text: Spent a few good hours at Driftwood Estate on the weekend and we had a great experience sampling wines 🥂 and even brought quite a few bottles home 😃. We endulged in their inhouse woodfired pizzas🍕, which were sooo yummy, whilst taking advantage of the beautiful scenery and landscape. They are currently refurbishing part of the estate and making it even grander so can't wait to go back and check it out again. Thanks to Gayle and the rest of the team for making us feel so welcome 😍
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Laura Dandrea
text:
Excellent as always, went here last year with my mum aunt and cousins, came back again this year with my mum sister and cousins. Gayle was excellent, explained about all the wines which is delicious, had a lovely chat and then we sat on the terrace for some amazing wood fire pizza.

The front reminds me of places in Europe, it’s beautiful. We will be back again. Thank you to all the friendly staff who were all up for a lovely chat also.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Shelley
text: Absolutely fabulous! We will be back !! We had the amazing pleasure of one of the best wine experiences in WA. From being warmly welcomed to professionally guided through tastings. Exceptional all round. Oh! and the wood fire pizza! Pepperoni + pineapple 🍕 🍍yum. Pop yourself at the bar for tastings, then recline in the couch for pizza. Thankyou to the team for an amazing afternoon experience! Tom, Gayle, Lisa and Peter, Thankyou for your gracious service and dedication to wine 🍷. See you again soon
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Lisa Johns
text:
Just had the best experience at Driftwood, we have been coming here for over 30 years and it remains one of the greats!!
We weren’t stopping for lunch but the lovely lady behind the counter suggested the pizza and it was delicious! Sitting on the balcony overlooking the amphitheater with a bottle of Fume Blanc, also recommended, was a wonderful way to spend an hour or so.
After buying a few bottles of their amazing wine we left, but will be looking forward to going back.
Friendly, professional staff, yummy food and great atmosphere!!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Richard Cooper
text: Love this place. Not pretentious … great wines and staff.  Just the winery we were looking for. Don’t drive by
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Tayla Ayling
text: Extremely disappointing, a group wine tasting and nothing impressed. Down south wineries are always incredibly memorable but this was far beyond unimpressive. Really sad as I used to love driftwood
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Rebecca Harrison
text:
You certainly feel like a piece of Driftwood when you visit this place.
It’s difficult to tell staff members apart from visitors.
People wonder around ignoring each other and visitors.
We had some wine splashed into a few glasses without explanation.
They have a pizza menu so we foolishly ordered a couple of pizzas.
You need it be able to read minds here as you are not shown where to eat the pizzas or when they could be ready.
There was a guy shuffling some pizzas into a pizza oven in between picking his teeth.
He berated some visitors for attempting to order food and shouted at them that this wasn’t a restaurant.
Altogether this feels like a place is bad.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Theo Casimatis
text: Wine was fabulous. We were lucky to be hosted around the winery by Tom. It was a most enlightening and enjoyable. Our time there was well spent and we will be returning. All staff accommodating and friendly. Highly recommended.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We’re thrilled you enjoyed the wines and that Tom helped make your visit both enlightening and enjoyable. I’ll be sure to pass on your kind words to him and the team.

We look forward to welcoming you back again soon! 🍷
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Holly Taylor
text: We dropped into Driftwood hoping to do a wine tasting during our stay in Margaret River. We had been warned about poor and unwelcoming front of house hospitality by our wine tour guide the day previously but thought we would give them the benefit of the doubt. Sadly they didn’t prove us wrong. We were met by an unfriendly front of house gentleman who clearly couldn’t be bothered to take us through a seated wine tasting despite having no other clients in the restaurant. We swiftly told him we would move onto somewhere else. A huge shame as seemed a lovely location but felt very unwelcome there.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Liz Buckingham
text: Stopped in at this winery today while visiting the region. Knowledgeable friendly staff, lots of wines to taste and the best stonefired pizza I've tasted since I was in Italy. A great experience.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your lovely review! We’re so pleased you stopped in and enjoyed the tasting experience and what a compliment about the pizza! 

Our team will be thrilled to hear your kind words. We hope to welcome you back again next time you’re in the region. 🍷
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Paul Croteau
text: Great pizza from a stone oven
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for the great feedback! We’re so glad you enjoyed our new pizza menu — it’s one of our favourites too. 🍕
title: Driftwood Estate

name: dennis
text:
If you are taking the scenic route down Caves road DON’T drive passed Driftwood Estate Winery.
Enjoy a tasting and If you are lucky enough to be scooped up by Gayle it’s like meeting up with an old friend.
Have a seat on the verandah and enjoy a grazing board and a bottle of your favourite wine whilst taking in the view,
Our visit was a highlight of our trip to Margaret River, we will definitely be back.
Thanks Gayle and all the other friendly staff for an awesome afternoon. N & D
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Jason Allan
text: The only venue of its calibre in the Southwest where you can come in for a chat and one of the best wood-fired pizzas you will come across seriously..... And the wine wow.....
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Rachel Durham
text:
Had the loveliest experience here today! The kiwi lady ( I forgot the name 🥲) who took us through the wine tasting was amazing, so knowledgable and fun!

The views are gorgeous and cheese platter was perfect definitely worth the visit!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Michael Nugent
text: We stopped in for a wine tasting and were looked after by Gayle and Peter, who were both incredibly knowledgeable and genuinely made the experience unforgettable. The cheese board was outstanding, and every wine we tasted was absolutely divine. Peter even took the time to show us around the wine vault, which was a fantastic addition to the experience. We couldn’t recommend Driftwood Estate highly enough. Thank you for such a wonderful visit!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Sophie Salter
text:
Best decision to call in today and had the best experience. New owners and Gayle made our experience so enjoyable. Shared platter on balcony in quiet location was the best. Thank you for looking after us so well and nice to see good hospitality still exists.
Wish you well in your new venture
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Katie Webb
text: Came here with a wine tasting tour. Gayle was phenomenal. We tried roughly 8 wines and they were all delicious, 1 sparkling 2 white 2 rosé 2 red and one 1 port. The 2021 cab sauv was the best I’ve ever had and the port was amazing as well. Great service and energy and got to meet Tom the owner . Would highly recommend!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Christy More-Booth
text: F4om the sart to finish everything was a let down. Starters and mains ended up being a disappointing meal due to the mshrooms being soggy and lacking in any flavour. Overcooked and general lack of care taken with any part of the service and production of food. Wouldn't recommend to anyone to come over the summer period or in general. For the prices there are much better, caring venues in the market river region.
responseFromOwnerText: Hi Christy, you may have the wrong venue as we do not have a restaurant here at Driftwood Estate. We are simply open for wine tastings. Thank you.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Catrina Lane
text:
Spring has sprung in the South West and there are so many spots at the winery to enjoy a glass of wine or a charcuterie board!
Sadly the restaurant is closed until further notice.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Anthony Spiteri
text:
Special place in my heart here … attended the opening back in 1995… but they also do one of the best Tawny Ports going round.

Great service there today, wine tasting and let us bring the dog in as well. He enjoyed it.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Brian Breeden
text: Brilliant service and wonderful port! Gave us many gifts. Thank you for everything! Outstanding!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Rebecca Mander
text: Amazing welcome, no charge for tastings and beautiful wines from a wide selection! If you want to find a genuine vineyard without all the hype and crowds, this is your place!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Keaton McSweeney
text: Fantastic afternoon spent here doing a tasting. Great, relaxed vibe
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Mike Bedford
text: Nice Tuscany feel,  wine's were very reasonably priced. The Shiraz cab sav and the cab sav were very nice.  Bought 6 bottles.  Highly recommend
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Sarah Smith
text: Wonderful tasting experience 😁❤️. We learned about the climatic influence on the grapes and tried a wide variety of wines. Lots of reasonably priced wines, very drinkable, including sparkling, whites, reds and through to tawny port.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Harrison Smith
text:
I had the most incredible experience at Driftwood Winery! From the moment we arrived, we were greeted by the serene beauty of the grounds, which immediately set the tone for a relaxing day. The tasting itself was exceptional—offering a range of 20 wines, each one more delightful than the last. What I loved most was the low-pressure atmosphere; we were able to savor each wine at our own pace without feeling rushed.

The highlight of our visit was the wonderful employee who helped curate a personalized tasting experience for us. Their knowledge and enthusiasm made the experience feel extra special, and they were more than willing to answer all our questions and guide us through the tasting. It was clear they genuinely cared about ensuring we had a memorable time.

If you're looking for a winery that combines beautiful surroundings, excellent wines, and a stress-free, enjoyable experience, Driftwood is the perfect destination. Highly recommend!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Paulina Mcg
text: One of the nicest experiences you can get in the area, very highly recommended
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Jess Stevens
text: Whole experience was amazing, the owner was absolutely incredible and gave us our own personal experience within the vineyard despite us not having a booking. Really enjoyed our time here & cannot recommend it enough, wines are delicious and entire place is stunning !!!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Donna O'Shea
text: A Lovely selection of wines and wonderful service from Ray. He is very knowledgeable about these wines and also some local history. Beautiful setting. Thank you!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Stephanie Farncombe-Smith
text: Friendly knowledgeable staff. Great wine. Lovely setting. Nice gifts.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Elliott Webb
text: AMZING blokes really took the time out for us, great winery. looks AWSOME inside
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Pearl Pyae
text: Had great wine tasting
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Peter Couchman
text: gotta meet Tom the owner...he's great
title: Driftwood Estate

name: bernie seaton
text: Had a lovely share platter with a nice rose 🍷 we will be returning
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Daniel Ecseri
text: Great venue
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Maddy Crockford
text:
Beautiful people, beautiful wine, lovely rustic place to be. Noticed a lot of city-slickers turn their nose up.
Place is beautiful for anyone who doesn't live in a concrete jungle
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Elvirus ff
text: The Best winery ever in Australia. I am from Spain and this is the first wine that taste like European ones. The hospitality of The owners was incredible, Peter did amazing selection in red wine tasting, thank you so much for sure we will come back.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: slade lever
text: Highly recommend, amazing food and service in beautiful surroundings
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Hudson Parkinson
text: Ate here with family back in December (forgot to leave a review earlier) and had an awesome time. Food tasted really fresh and full of flavour. I have only eaten duck a handful of times and it was absolutely amazing at Driftwood. Service was great too, their were some younger staff that were impressive as well. My family all enjoyed their meals too. Looking forward to coming back soon.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Andrew Walton
text: Fantastic time, great food and wine. Definately worth another visit.
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Carolyn McCarthy
text: We absolutely loved Driftwood Estate. We went for a Friday night dinner - it could not of been better. The food was super fresh and yummy and their wine was a perfect match. Would high recommend the wood fired pizza. The atmosphere was very relaxed and the service was 10/10. We will be back soon!
title: Driftwood Estate

name: Dani Russell
text: Food was awesome 👌
title: Driftwood Estate
